{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"{\"session_id\":\"\",\"offset\":400}","has_more":false,"total":1},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7353229339926790964","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书的故事情节很吸引人，每个故事都充满了悬念，让人忍不住想要一探究竟。我特别喜欢其中那个关于真假聋哑人的故事，小刘这个角色很机智，他通过手语发现了那些姑娘的破绽。这本书不仅有悬疑推理，还能让人思考，很有意思，值得一读！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1708426068,"group_id":"7122673514477259789","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NwhmFdxR177Un+NA2TC/lzMElVsWKSOzIWeDq45HwdfQ","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"2157714943783179","user_name":"四征四镇的老孟头"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2157714943783179","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7122673514477259789","book_info":{"abstract":"悬疑、推理小说的优秀之处在于它不仅情节曲折离奇，环环相扣，而且通过深入细致的分析和精准到位的判断折服众人，不仅使人获得艺术上的享受、感官上的刺激、灵魂上的震撼，而且使思想得到启发。 阅读《不一样的悬疑推理》，每一个故事都是一场跋涉，随作者亲历一场灵魂的冒险之后，拨开迷雾，便是酣畅淋漓的豁然与如释重负的轻松。《不一样的悬疑推理》，让您越看越想看！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/c5b5816a1db7bbfe979e6e4d6881006e~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"翟参","author_id":"","book_id":"7122673514477259789","book_name":"脑洞大会：不一样的悬疑推理","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#303030","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"1799人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":56,\"name\":\"成功励志\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=56\u0026name=成功励志\u0026genre_type=160\u0026gender=2\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":411,\"name\":\"思维智商\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=411\u0026name=思维智商\u0026genre_type=160\u0026gender=2\u0026source=detail\"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7122681241001790471","read_count":"7","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"119536"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.5","serial_count":"231","tags":"成功励志,思维智商","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/c5b5816a1db7bbfe979e6e4d6881006e~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1779396542\u0026x-signature=PVExDqFSsmsQq5tD%2FDA03SEVAbM%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":""},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":1,"reply_show_row":3,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":4,"forwarded_count":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":11340,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":44},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4}],"extra":{"book_info":{"abstract":"悬疑、推理小说的优秀之处在于它不仅情节曲折离奇，环环相扣，而且通过深入细致的分析和精准到位的判断折服众人，不仅使人获得艺术上的享受、感官上的刺激、灵魂上的震撼，而且使思想得到启发。
